prompt: Design semantic search for WorldPulse using Pinecone free tier on Node.js/Fastify + PostgreSQL. Should cover embedding strategy, sync mechanisms, trade-offs, and v1 scoping.

assertions.name: covers_embedding_strategy
assertions.description: Discusses how signals get embedded (model, when, batch vs real-time)

assertions.name: addresses_sync
assertions.description: Mentions how to keep Pinecone in sync with new signals (upsert, pipeline, etc.)

assertions.name: mentions_v1_scoping
assertions.description: Distinguishes what to build first vs what to do later
